new_claims.claim_text: US agreed to release frozen Iranian assets in Qatar and other foreign banks to reopen the Strait of Hormuz
new_claims.notes: Claim from senior Iranian official, denied by US official. High propaganda risk.

new_claims.claim_text: China is preparing to ship weapons (MANPADs) to Iran within weeks, routed through third countries
new_claims.notes: Claim from CNN citing US intelligence, denied by Chinese embassy spokesperson. High geopolitical tension.

new_claims.claim_text: Iran's Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps (IRGC) extracting transit tolls from vessels seeking passage through the Strait of Hormuz, sometimes payable in cryptocurrency
new_claims.notes: Reported activity suggesting control and monetization of a critical international waterway. Raises concerns about economic impact and compliance with sanctions.
